forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: We've sent you an email with instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If account exists, check your email for reset link
forgotPassword.checkEmailMessage: If an account with that email exists, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.invalidTokenDescription: This password reset link is no longer valid.
resetPassword.invalidTokenMessage: The reset token may have expired or was already used. Please request a new password reset link.
resetPassword.tokenDetected: Reset token detected from email link.

hero.title: Your AI Accountant
hero.subtitle: 24/7 Business Partner
hero.description: Transform your business with intelligent automation. Accountia replaces traditional accounting with AI-driven insights, automated bookkeeping, and real-time financial guidance.

features.title: Everything You Need to Manage Your Business
features.description: Powerful features designed to streamline your financial operations

aiInsights.title: AI-Powered Insights
aiInsights.description: Get intelligent financial recommendations and predictions based on your business data

automatedBookkeeping.title: Automated Bookkeeping
automatedBookkeeping.description: Eliminate manual data entry with smart categorization and real-time reconciliation

realtimeAnalytics.title: Real-time Analytics
realtimeAnalytics.description: Monitor your business performance with live dashboards and custom reports

smartInvoicing.title: Smart Invoicing
smartInvoicing.description: Create, send, and track invoices automatically with AI-powered payment reminders

taxOptimization.title: Tax Optimization
taxOptimization.description: Maximize deductions and minimize tax liability with intelligent tax planning

security.title: Bank-level Security
security.description: Your financial data is protected with enterprise-grade encryption and security

solutions.title: Built for Every Business Type
solutions.description: Whether you're a startup or enterprise, we've got you covered

startups.title: Startups
startups.description: Perfect for new businesses looking to establish solid financial foundations

smallBusiness.title: Small Business
smallBusiness.description: Comprehensive tools for growing businesses with expanding needs

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Advanced features for large organizations with complex requirements

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
cta.description: Join thousands of businesses that have already made the switch to AI-powered financial management.
